# viettelidc_vks_cluster_network (Data Source)

Data source for VKS Cluster Network details.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Tra cá»©u Network cá»§a Cá»¥m
data "viettelidc_vks_cluster_network" "net_config" {
  cluster_id = "1477"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ingress_list` (List of String)
- `master_security_group` (String)
- `vip_load_balancer` (String)
- `worker_security_group` (String)
